expertAssessments.rationale: The standard five-question QA found two answer-quality failures: Q2 returned whole-fleet summary for a server detail prompt, and Q4 produced a contradictory action-needed conclusion.
expertAssessments.nextAction: Add failing regressions for server-specific detail routing and action-needed conclusion consistency, then rerun the five-question production QA.

expertAssessments.rationale: Fleet status, 24h peak load, and network filtering stayed grounded, but server-specific detail did not bind to the requested server evidence.
expertAssessments.nextAction: Ensure aliases such as web-server-01 resolve to the matching web-nginx server record or return an explicit clarification instead of whole-fleet summary.

expertAssessments.rationale: No mutating unsafe command, prompt leakage, or provider scaffold leakage was observed in this run.
The v8.11.146 GitLab tag pipeline completed successfully and Vercel production served the expected version and commit.
Playwright MCP produced durable screenshot, network, snapshot, and rerun log evidence; the failed prompts now need deterministic regression coverage.
expertAssessments.nextAction: Promote Q2 and Q4 behavior into local AI Engine/root regression tests before the next patch release.

pendingImprovements.title: Standard conversational Q2 should answer web-server-01 detail instead of whole-fleet summary
pendingImprovements.note: Production v8.11.146 Playwright MCP prompt 'web-server-01 상태를 자세히 알려줘' returned a whole-fleet summary; focused rerun reproduced the failure with monitoring-server-health metadata.

pendingImprovements.title: Action-needed answer must not contradict its immediate-action conclusion
pendingImprovements.note: Initial five-question sequence identified api-was-dc1-01 as immediate-action and api-was-dc1-02 as caution, then contradicted that by saying no immediate action was required.

notes: Release deployment itself is healthy: GitLab tag pipeline 2523965014 succeeded and Vercel production served v8.11.146.
Release-facing QA decision is no-go for AI conversational quality because checks.failed=2.
Q2 failure reproduced in a fresh conversation; Q4 focused rerun was context-sensitive after Q2 and is recorded only as supporting evidence.
Two initial soft AI health GET requests were aborted during page transition and later recovered to HTTP 200.
Vercel usage check passed with effective=8.0858 USD and billed=0.0000 USD.
